_comment: Pick one chain to start. Uncomment active, leave others for reference.

ethereum_sepolia.name: Ethereum Sepolia Testnet
ethereum_sepolia.notes: Most tooling support. High mainnet gas but testnet is free.

polygon_amoy.name: Polygon Amoy Testnet
polygon_amoy.notes: Low mainnet fees. Good for high-volume token transfers.

arbitrum_sepolia.name: Arbitrum Sepolia Testnet
arbitrum_sepolia.notes: Fast L2 with Ethereum security. DeFi-native community.

linea.name: Linea Mainnet
linea.notes: ConsenSys/MetaMask zkEVM L2. Very low gas (~$0.10-0.50 to deploy). Strong dev credibility.

solana_devnet.name: Solana Devnet
solana_devnet.notes: Different paradigm — not EVM. Requires Anchor framework instead of Hardhat.

local.name: Hardhat Local Node
local.notes: Always start here. Fast, no gas costs, instant finality.
